#  View the Deleted Drawing Revisions Report 
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions:**
    * 'Admin' on the project's Drawings tool.
  * **_Important!_** Projects created before June 2016 do not have this report in the Drawings tool.


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the project's **Drawings** tool.
  2. _Optional:_ If your project uses Drawing Areas, select the relevant **Drawing Area**.
  3. Scroll down to the 'Drawing Reports' section.
  4. Click **Deleted Drawing Revisions**.  
![Deleted Drawing Revisions](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/730e1c3a433ab5b08aca8151963dc820/27bdc6d08ce32813bc63d747dc067242/deleted_2Bdrawing_2Brevisions.png?fm=webp)  
_Note_ : You will see a list of all the drawings that have been deleted.


#### Download Deleted Drawings
  * Mark the checkbox next to each drawing you would like to download.
  * Click the orange **Download Drawings** button in the right pane.  
_Note_ : You cannot retrieve deleted drawing revisions and have them populate back into Procore automatically. Instead, you must download any deleted drawings and [reupload them to the Drawings tool](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/user-guide-bidding-and-estimating-integration/upload-drawings).


#### Search and Filter for Deleted Drawings
  * Use the search box to search for drawings by title or number.
  * Use the filter boxes to filter for drawings by discipline and drawing set name.


#### Export Deleted Drawings Report as a PDF or CSV
  * Export the deleted drawings report to a PDF or CSV by clicking on the corresponding buttons in the top right of the page.  
_Note_ : The PDF or CSV will export only those drawings that are currently in the list. This means that it considers search and filter parameters.


## See Also
  * [View Deleted Drawing Revisions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-project/tutorials/view-deleted-drawing-revisions)
  * [Drawings - Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-project/permissions)
  * [View the All Sets and Revisions Report in the Drawings Tool](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-project/tutorials/view-the-all-sets-and-revisions-report-in-the-drawings-tool)
title: View the Deleted Drawing Revisions Report
description: How to view a report of all deleted drawings in the project's Drawing tool.
